command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "$head=(git rev-parse HEAD).Trim(); $remote=(git rev-parse origin/main).Trim(); if ($head -ne $remote -or $head -ne 'e68420f769ca5d4d70cf2967742fa8028051b7f9') { throw 'push verification failed' }; if (git status --porcelain=v1) { throw 'workspace dirty' }; Write-Output ('PASS pushed_anchor=' + $head)"
cannot_claim: semantic correctness of the tested behavior
receipt authenticity: every field is fabricatable by a direct writer
